message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals EU Size 36.5
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Luxurious Intrecciato Woven Sandals for Women
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** Elevate your style with these iconic Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals, featuring the brand's signature Intrecciato woven design in a sleek and comfortable EU size 36.5.
**Description (Descrizione):** The Bottega Veneta Lido Sandals are a testament to the brand's commitment to luxury and craftsmanship. Crafted from high-quality Nappa leather, these sandals showcase the iconic Intrecciato woven design that has become synonymous with Bottega Veneta's elegance and sophistication. The EU size 36.5 ensures a comfortable fit, while the sleek design makes them versatile enough to be dressed up or down. Perfect for any occasion, these sandals are a must-have for anyone looking to add a touch of luxury to their wardrobe.
